mapper.sql: id, dataset_type, dataset_name, sort, version, dataset_path, update_time, `temp`
mapper.insert: insert into dataset_table (id, dataset_type, dataset_name, sort, version, dataset_path, update_time, `temp`) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataset_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataset_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataset_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{temp,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dataset_table
id,
dataset_type,
dataset_name,
sort,
version,
dataset_path,
update_time,
`temp`,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dataset_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dataset_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dataset_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{temp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dataset_table
dataset_type = #{dataset_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dataset_name = #{dataset_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dataset_path = #{dataset_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`temp` = #{temp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dataset_table set dataset_type = #{dataset_type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dataset_name = #{dataset_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dataset_path = #{dataset_path,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{update_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `temp` = #{temp,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
